spec_sheets.title: American BioCarbon Absorbent Pellets - Technical Specification Sheet
spec_sheets.description: Complete technical specifications for American BioCarbon Absorbent Pellets including absorption ratios, bulk density, applications, cost/freight comparisons, and sustainability profile.

spec_sheets.title: American BioCarbon Bagasse-Based Biochar - Technical, Nutritional & Environmental Report
spec_sheets.description: Complete technical specifications for American BioCarbon Bagasse-Based Biochar including carbon content, inherent nutrients (N-P-K), SEM microstructure analysis, heavy-metal analysis, and 12 independent IBI laboratory certifications.
